questionHtml: Suggest a reason for the difference in the time observed eating and drinking.
markschemeHtml:
1. more food/energy eaten/required in winter/cold;
  2. food needed to maintain temperature/stay warm/generate heat;
  3. more loss of body heat in cold conditions;
  4. more energy used hunting for food;
  5. food less available in winter/harder to find enough food;

meta.title: Suggest a reason for the difference in the time observed eating and drinking.
breadcrumbLabels: C3.1.4. The brain as a central information integration organ
